Eye of the Tiger
As performed by: Survivor
Key:  Gm, Original Cm
INTRO:  /G  | Gm  (F)  Gm  (F)  Gm  (Bb/D)  Eb | x4  Gm


VERSE 1:
           Eb/G               F/G                       Gm
Risin' up, back on the street      Did my time, took my chances
                           Eb/G                    F/G                    Gm
Went the distance, now I'm back on my feet  Just a man and his will to survive
                  Eb/G             F/G                             Gm
So many times, it happens too fast      You trade your passion for glory
                            Eb/G                         F/G                      Gm
Don't lose your grip on the dreams of the past  You must fight just to keep them alive


CHORUS:
(F    Gm7) Cm                            Bb            F
 It's the     eye of the tiger, it's the thrill of the fight
   (Gm7) Cm                        (Gm   F)
Ri-sin'  up to the challenge of our ri- -val
   (Gm7) Cm                             Bb          F
And the  last known survivor stalks his prey in the night
   (Gm7) Cm          Bb           Eb         Gm
And he's watchin' us all with the eye of the tiger


VERSE 2:
                  Eb/G        F/G                         Gm
Face to face, out in the heat      Hangin' tough, stayin' hungry
                             Eb/G                        F/G                       Gm
They stack the odds still we take to the street  For the kill with the skill to survive


(CHORUS)


VERSE 1a:
           Eb/G                F/G                        Gm
Risin' up, straight to the top      Had the guts, got the glory
                           Eb/G                    F/G                    Gm
Went the distance, now I'm not gonna stop   Just a man and his will to survive


(CHORUS)


OUTRO: x4 ish
Gm  (F)  Gm  (F)  Gm  (Bb/D)  Eb                 (Gm)
                                   The eye of the tiger


















































Eye of the Tiger
As performed by: Survivor
Key:  Cm, Original Cm
INTRO:  /C  | Cm  (Bb)  Cm  (Bb)  Cm  (Eb/G)  Ab | x4  Cm


VERSE 1:
           Ab/C               Bb/C                      Cm
Risin' up, back on the street      Did my time, took my chances
                           Ab/C                    Bb/C                   Cm
Went the distance, now I'm back on my feet  Just a man and his will to survive
                  Ab/C             Bb/C                            Cm
So many times, it happens too fast      You trade your passion for glory
                            Ab/C                         Bb/C                     Cm
Don't lose your grip on the dreams of the past  You must fight just to keep them alive


CHORUS:
(Bb   Cm7) Fm                            Eb            Bb
 It's the     eye of the tiger, it's the thrill of the fight
   (Cm7) Fm                        (Cm   Bb)
Ri-sin'  up to the challenge of our ri- -val
   (Cm7) Fm                             Eb          Bb
And the  last known survivor stalks his prey in the night
   (Cm7) Fm          Eb           Ab         Cm
And he's watchin' us all with the eye of the tiger


VERSE 2:
                  Ab/C        Bb/C                        Cm
Face to face, out in the heat      Hangin' tough, stayin' hungry
                             Ab/C                        Bb/C                      Cm
They stack the odds still we take to the street  For the kill with the skill to survive


(CHORUS)


VERSE 1a:
           Ab/C                Bb/C                       Cm
Risin' up, straight to the top      Had the guts, got the glory
                           Ab/C                    Bb/C                   Cm
Went the distance, now I'm not gonna stop   Just a man and his will to survive


(CHORUS)


OUTRO: x4 ish
Cm  (Bb)  Cm  (Bb)  Cm  (Eb/G)  Ab                 (Cm)
                                   The eye of the tiger
